title: Line by Line Summary of Enterprise by Nissim Ezekiel |
description:
Few Indian poets captured the absurdity of ambition quite like Nissim Ezekiel, and his celebrated poem *Enterprise* exposes that absurdity with devastating precision — a group sets out on a grand pilgrimage, full of purpose, only to return home having learned nothing except that the journey itself was the illusion. Studied across BA English Honours programmes in DU, SOL, and IGNOU, this poem rewards close reading because every stanza quietly dismantles the myth of heroic endeavour through irony and disillusionment. If you've ever wondered why a "successful" quest can feel so hollow, Ezekiel's *Enterprise* answers that question in fourteen ruthless stanzas.
